projects.name: AnonyMate - PII Redaction Tool
projects.description: A tool that detects and redacts sensitive information (PII) from images and PDFs using OCR. Built with a user-friendly interface for secure data handling.

projects.name: Hiredly - Job Application Tracker
projects.description: A full-stack web application that helps users track job applications, manage statuses, and stay organized during their job search process.

projects.name: Family Game Night Planner
projects.description: A modern web application to plan and organize family game nights with a clean UI and interactive features.
